title: lysimachia djalonis
intro: Lysimachia djalonis, also known as Djallon tea, is a plant species native to West Africa that belongs to the Primulaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Lysimachia djalonis is commonly prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
